series_metadata.series_description: This is a daily activity report signed by compliance officers detailing activities and expenses. It includes information about types of activity, location of compliance officer, action taken and explanation of expenses. It is used to legally verify a compliance officers activity. (fna PM-217)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: From 2003 through 2005 the paper records are retained in storage in retention boxes for 10 years then destroyed. ; Electronic: Beginning in 2005, the Compliance Officers Daily Reports are entered electronically into the Ohio Liquor Law Enforcement (OLLE) computer data base. The OLLE computer data base is maintained by the Ohio Department of Public Safety., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Permanent
